results.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    meta.helm.sh/release-name: astronomy-shop
    meta.helm.sh/release-namespace: astronomy-shop
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-18T08:52:48Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: product-catalog
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
    app.kubernetes.io/name: product-catalog
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: opentelemetry-demo
    app.kubernetes.io/version: 2.2.0
    helm.sh/chart: opentelemetry-demo-0.40.4
    opentelemetry.io/name: product-catalog
  name: product-catalog
  namespace: astronomy-shop
  resourceVersion: "1179498"
  uid: 9adde14b-dbc6-4844-bf1a-743eb9d57eed
spec:
  progressDeadlineSeconds: 600
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      opentelemetry.io/name: product-catalog
  strategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 25%
      maxUnavailable: 25%
    type: RollingUpdate
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        resource.opentelemetry.io/service.namespace: otel-demo
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/component: product-catalog
        app.kubernetes.io/name: product-catalog
        app.kubernetes.io/version: 2.2.0
        opentelemetry.io/name: product-catalog
    spec:
      containers:
      - env:
        - name: OTEL_SERVICE_NAME
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              apiVersion: v1
              fieldPath: metadata.labels['app.kubernetes.io/component']
        - name: OTEL_COLLECTOR_NAME
          value: otel-collector
        - name: OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_METRICS_TEMPORALITY_PREFERENCE
          value: cumulative
        - name: PRODUCT_CATALOG_PORT
          value: "8080"
        - name: FLAGD_HOST
          value: flagd
        - name: FLAGD_PORT
          value: "8013"
        - name: GOMEMLIMIT
          value: 16MiB
        - name: DB_CONNECTION_STRING
          value: postgres://otelu:[REDACTED]@postgresql/otel?sslmode=disable
        - name: OTEL_SEMCONV_STABILITY_OPT_IN
          value: database
        - name: OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT
          value: http://$(OTEL_COLLECTOR_NAME):4317
        image: ghcr.io/open-telemetry/demo:2.2.0-product-catalog
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: product-catalog
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: service
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          limits:
            memory: 20Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: astronomy-shop
      serviceAccountName: astronomy-shop
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
status:
  availableReplicas: 1
  conditions:
  - lastTransitionTime: "2026-07-18T08:59:13Z"
    lastUpdateTime: "2026-07-18T08:59:13Z"
    message: Deployment has minimum availability.
    reason: MinimumReplicasAvailable
    status: "True"
    type: Available
  - lastTransitionTime: "2026-07-18T08:52:49Z"
    lastUpdateTime: "2026-07-18T08:59:13Z"
    message: ReplicaSet "product-catalog-77497fdc44" has successfully progressed.
    reason: NewReplicaSetAvailable
    status: "True"
    type: Progressing
  observedGeneration: 1
  readyReplicas: 1
  replicas: 1
  updatedReplicas: 1
